The Art of the Cut

Experience the perfect harmony of dry-aged perfection and elemental fire.

Our Select Cuts

The Tomahawk Reserve

32oz dry-aged Wagyu ribeye, smoked volcanic salt, bone-marrow demi-glace.

$165

Filet Mignon au Poivre

8oz center-cut filet, Madagascar peppercorn crust, cognac cream reduction.

$68

Charred Wagyu Flank

10oz wood-fired flank steak, chimichurri rojo, blistered shishito peppers.

$45

Forged in Fire

Every cut at IGNIS tells a story of patience, precision, and passion.

The Perfect Pour

A curated cellar to complement every cut.
